title: Tensura: Stellar Prism
description: Tensura addon that adds stuff from Slimes Project, Project Mirage, and more
body:
Tensura addon that adds stuff from Slimes Project, Project Mirage, and more
Check Discord for more detailed info on Skills and Races and Items


 The Addons BTRUltima and Tensura: Mystism are required dependencies 


## Some of of the current additions.


 <details>
<summary>Uniques</summary>
     
> **World Catalyst**

"Dominate the worlds themselves creation has no limit upon what you can achieve as the catalyst of this vessel"

Obtainment
- Reincarnation/Skill Reroll
or
- chance when evolution into bio/ corrupt slime
or
- consume 10 Memory of ending Worlds﻿


> **Hope's Embrace**

"Embrace the new vessel of hope letting it push you forward to overcome the greatest odds"

Obtainment
- Reincarnation/Skill Reroll
or
- chance when evolution into bio/ corrupt slime
or
- consume 10 Memory of empty Hope (1 if world catalyst is obtained)

Evolution - Star of WillPower

> **Power Ascension**

__Amulet Skill Series__
"Harness the vessel of power and awaken something beyond your limits"

Obtainment 
- Reincarnation/Skill Reroll
or
- chance when evolution into bio/ corrupt slime
or
- consume 10 Memory of forgotten Power (1 if world catalyst is obtained)

Evolution - Star of WillPower
﻿
> **Passives**

Master of Power [Passive - Toggle] - Makes the users attacks deal 2x (3x upon mastery) extra damage

> **Ruby**

"When one's Flames of passion burn bright enough they may be blessed with such a heart"

Heartstone skill

Obtainment
- Reincarnation/Reroll
- Elemental Kitsune Spirit

> **Onyx**

"When the Darkness that consumes all has reached your heart"

Obtainment - Reincarnation/Reroll


Evolution - Ebony: Void Spirit Kitsune

﻿
> **Passives**

Dark Protection [True Passive] - Makes the user immune to the virus debuff

</details>


 
 <details>
<summary>Races</summary>
   
Bio Slime Line
**Bio Slime**

*Requirements ->* Artificial Slime + 5 Heroes Spirit


*Attributes ->*
　　Is not Majin.
　　Base Health - 20
　　Spiritual Health - 50
　　Base Attack - 2
　　Base Attack Speed - 3.5
　　Knockback Resistance - 0.5
　　Jump Height - 2
　　Movement Speed - 0.3
　　Sprinting Speed - 1.0

*Intrinsics  ->*
Fighter 99% chance, 1% to roll an amulet skill
if you have Fighter already you roll an amulet skill

*Evolution  ->*
Super Slime - 10 Wisdom Shards and 50k ep

Godly Super Slime - 250k ep
Corrupt Slime Line
> **Corrupt Slime**

*Requirements ->*  Artificial Slime + 5 Villainous spirit


*Attributes ->*
　　Is Majin.
　　Base Health - 40
　　Spiritual Health - 100
　　Base Attack - 1.5
　　Base Attack Speed - 3.5
　　Knockback Resistance - 1.2
　　Jump Height - 1.5
　　Movement Speed - 0.1
　　Sprinting Speed - 0.3
         Flying Speed - 0.2
        Can Fly.

*Intrinsics  ->* Guardian 99% chance, 1% to roll an amulet skill
if you have guardian already you roll an amulet skill

 *Evolution  ->* 
Corruption Armor - Requires 3 corruption shards and 100k ep

Crimson Armor - Requires 25 demon essence and 150k ep

Succubus Slime - Requires 25 demon essence and 250k ep

Elemental Kitsune Spirit Line
> **Race-Basic Elemental Kitsune Spirit**

*Requirements ->*
　　Kitsune Spirit,
　　200.000.000EP,
　　20 Beast Essence,
　　20 Elemental Essence.
          (Not actually a race just the basics for all elements) 

*Attributes ->*
　　Is Majin.
　　Is Divine.
　　Base Health - 10.000
　　Spiritual Health - 30.0x
　　Player Size - 2.3
　　Base Attack - 20.0
　　Base Attack Speed - 10.0
　　Knockback Resistance - 0.5
　　Jump Height - 3.5
　　Movement Speed - 0.4
　　Sprinting Speed - 1.3
　　Flying Speed - 0.2

*Intrinsics->*
　　magic transform, magics, and resistances
         Matching Heartstone unique for each type
          Spiritual Null
</details>
